articles.title: New Zealand Equities Retreat for 3rd Session
articles.expand: New Zealand shares fell 45 points, or 0.3%, to 13,574 in Wednesday morning trade, extending their decline to a third consecutive session. The move followed a sharp sell-off on Wall Street, as investors worried that the escalating conflict in the Middle East could stoke inflation. The New Zealand government in Wellington said it is closely monitorin...
articles.ai_headline: Caída de la bolsa neozelandesa por tercer día consecutivo: inquietud por conflicto en Medio Oriente → NZD bajista

articles.title: US Stocks Pare Sharp Losses
articles.expand: US equities trimmed steep intraday losses on Tuesday, with the S P 500 closing down 0.9%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average off 0.8%, and the Nasdaq Composite losing 1.1%. Markets initially sold off sharply on escalating US-Iran tensions, but sentiment improved after President Trump pledged to have US naval forces escort oil tankers through the Stra...
articles.ai_headline: Tensión EEUU-Irán aumenta pero Trump anuncia escort de petroleros: sentimiento mejora → USD neutral

articles.title: Oro cae cerca de los 5.100$ mientras los temores de inflación pesan en medio del conflicto en Oriente Medio
articles.expand: El precio del Oro (XAU/USD) enfrenta cierta presión de venta cerca de 5.100$ durante la primera sesión asiática del miércoles. El metal precioso cae en medio de una renovada demanda del Dólar estadounidense (USD) y perspectivas desalentadoras para recortes de tasas en EE.UU.
articles.ai_headline: Demanda del dólar estadounidense se renueva: perspectivas desalentadoras para recortes de tasas en EEUU → USD alcista

articles.title: EUR/GBP. Why the Middle Eastern Storm Is Sinking the Euro, Not the Pound?
articles.expand: The European currency against the pound showed upward momentum throughout February, rising from 0.8611 to 0.8788 (its high last week). However, this week the cross pair reversed by 180 degrees and declined by almost 100 points. The preceding growth of EUR/GBP appeared quite logical and justified. The European Central Bank had been adopting a "moder...
articles.ai_headline: Tormenta en Medio Oriente: presión geopolítica sobre la zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: Pronóstico del Precio del NZD/USD: Los bajistas acechan tras probar a la baja la DMA de 200 días
articles.expand: El Dólar neozelandés extiende sus pérdidas por segundo día consecutivo en medio de un Dólar estadounidense firme debido al conflicto en Oriente Medio, que avivó los temores de una mayor inflación provocada por el aumento de los precios del petróleo. El NZD/USD cotiza a 0.5889, bajando un 0,80%
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Oriente Medio aviva temores de inflación: aumento de precios del petróleo → USD alcista

articles.title: TA Alert of the Day: EUR/GBP Momentum Fades as Bearish MACD Crossover Warns of Pullback Risk
articles.expand: EUR/GBP has a bearish MACD crossover, suggesting fading upside momentum and a potential pullback. Could the signal be confirmed and push lower, or fail and reverse higher?
articles.ai_headline: Cruce bajista MACD en EUR/GBP: momentum a la baja sugiere posible repunte → GBP alcista

articles.title: New Zealand Q4 terms of trade +3.7% q/q vs -0.7% expected
articles.expand: Prior was -2.1% Import prices vs +0.8% expected Prior import prices +0.5% Export prices vs +0.5% expected Prior export prices -1.6% New Zealand's terms of trade measure the ratio of the country's export prices to its import prices, serving as a key indicator of the nation's purchasing power in international markets. This metric is particularly impo...
articles.ai_headline: Balanza comercial de Nueva Zelanda sube 3.7% intertrimestral superando expectativas: mejora en la relación de precios de exportación e importación → NZD alcista

articles.title: investingLive Americas FX news wrap 3 Mar: Mideast conflict dominate.USD/Gold/Stocks fall.
articles.expand: S P and NASDAQ index close down near 1% Trump: DFC to provide political risk insurance and guarantees to all Maritime Trade Pres. Trump speaking from the White House: Felt strongly Iran was going to attack first Feds Kashkari: Iran war impact could have monetary policy impact ECB's Kazaks: Current rates are appropriate based on what I am seeing Fed...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Medio Oriente genera incertidumbre: tensiones geopolíticas aumentan → USD alcista

articles.title: El EUR/USD cae a medida que las tensiones en Oriente Medio elevan el USD a pesar de la alta inflación en la Eurozona
articles.expand: El EUR/USD baja durante la sesión norteamericana, aunque ha rebotado desde los mínimos diarios alcanzados en 1.1530 debido a las crecientes tensiones en Oriente Medio, a pesar de un aumento de la inflación en la Eurozona. El par cotiza a 1.1618, con una caída del 0.63%.
articles.ai_headline: Tensiones en Oriente Medio: aumento de la aversión al riesgo → USD alcista

articles.title: Mexican Peso Tumbles to 6-Week Lows
articles.expand: The Mexican peso weakened toward 17.7 per dollar on Tuesday, reaching a six-week low as a large trade deficit and energy price shocks left the currency exposed to a global shift into safe-haven assets. The escalation of the US-Iran conflict and the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz have intensified risk-off sentiment, driving investors towa...
articles.ai_headline: Peso mexicano cae a mínimos de 6 semanas en 17.7 por dólar: inversores buscan refugio en activos seguros, USD alcista

articles.title: El USD/CAD cae mientras la perspectiva alcista del petróleo impulsa al Dólar canadiense
articles.expand: El USD/CAD cae alrededor de un 0.10% el martes, situándose cerca de 1.3660 en un cambio diario tenue después de que la oferta más amplia del Dólar estadounidense (USD) del lunes no lograra mantenerse.
articles.ai_headline: Perspectiva alcista del petróleo: precios altos → CAD alcista

articles.title: US could provide military protection to ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz
articles.expand: Oil prices have pulled back from session highs after reports that the US may provide military protection for vessels traveling through the Strait of Hormuz. Earlier fears that tankers would be unable to offload cargo — potentially filling storage capacity and forcing production cuts — helped fuel a sharp rally in crude. WTI climbed to a high of $77...

articles.title: EURUSD rebounding, but buyers have more to prove
articles.expand: The EURUSD extended its downside momentum, accelerating away from the 100-day and 200-day moving averages at 1.1694 and 1.1664. That rejection of key longer-term levels reinforced the bearish bias and opened the door for a deeper move lower. Sellers pushed the pair through the 2026 low at 1.1576, triggering additional downside pressure. The decline...

articles.title: ECB's Kazaks: Current rates are appropriate based on what I am seeing
articles.expand: ECB's Kazaks: Current rates are appropriate based on what I am seeing. There is no need to rush a hike. There are opposing forces coming from Iran shock and it depends on which one is a stronger. February inflation readings will keep us in cautious mode. The overall tone of the Kazaks comments are neutral to mildly dovish, focusing on data dependen...
articles.ai_headline: Kazaks del BCE considera tasas actuales adecuadas: no hay necesidad de subir tasas → EUR bajista

articles.title: BCE: El shock energético mantiene la política estable – Nomura
articles.expand: Andrzej Szczepaniak, Josie Anderson, George Buckley y David Seif de Nomura argumentan que el Banco Central Europeo en gran medida pasará por alto los recientes movimientos del mercado impulsados por la energía y mantendrá su enfoque en su pronóstico de IPCA a largo plazo.
articles.ai_headline: BCE mantiene política estable pese a shock energético: enfoque en IPC a largo plazo → EUR neutral

articles.title: ECB: Energy shock keeps policy steady – Nomura
articles.expand: Nomura’s Andrzej Szczepaniak, Josie Anderson, George Buckley and David Seif argue that the European Central Bank will largely look through recent energy-driven market moves and keep its focus on its end-horizon HICP forecast.
articles.ai_headline: BCE mantiene política estable pese a choque energético: expectativa de inflación a largo plazo → EUR neutral

articles.title: El EUR/GBP se suaviza a pesar de la subida de la inflación en la Eurozona
articles.expand: El Euro (EUR) cotiza bajo una leve presión frente a la Libra esterlina (GBP) el martes, ya que los operadores reevalúan las perspectivas de política monetaria de los principales bancos centrales en medio de preocupaciones inflacionarias vinculadas a los precios más altos del petróleo impulsados por el conflicto entre EE.UU. e Irán
articles.ai_headline: Subida inflación Eurozona no impulsa EUR frente a GBP: presión bajista sobre EUR

articles.title: EUR/GBP eases despite stronger Eurozone inflation data
articles.expand: The Euro (EUR) trades under mild pressure against the British Pound (GBP) on Tuesday as traders reassess the monetary policy outlook for major central banks amid inflation concerns tied to higher Oil prices driven by the US-Iran conflict.
articles.ai_headline: EUR/GBP se debilita pese a datos de inflación más fuertes en la Eurozona: presión sobre EUR

articles.title: Euro area: Oil shock lifts inflation outlook – Commerzbank
articles.expand: Commerzbank’s Dr. Vincent Stamer notes Euro area inflation rose to 1.9% in February, with core inflation at 2.4%, both above expectations.
articles.ai_headline: Inflación zona euro sube a 1.9% en febrero con core en 2.4%: presión alcista sobre EUR

articles.title: AUD: Hawkish RBA and commodities cushion energy shock – MUFG
articles.expand: MUFG’s Senior Currency Analyst Lee Hardman reports that the Australian Dollar and Canadian Dollar are holding up better against the US Dollar than European currencies.
articles.ai_headline: RBA hawkish y commodities amortiguan choque energético: AUD alcista

articles.title: USD/JPY: Tips for Beginner Traders on March 3rd (U.S. Session)
articles.expand: Trade Review and Trading Advice for the Japanese Yen The test of the 157.54 price level occurred when the MACD indicator had just begun moving upward from the zero mark, confirming a good entry point for buying the dollar. As a result, the pair rose by 30 points. Trump's statements that the war in Iran will continue for as long as necessary trigger...
articles.ai_headline: Declaraciones de Trump sobre guerra en Irán: inestabilidad geopolítica → JPY alcista

articles.title: Oil Prices Continue to Rise Amid Escalation of the US and Israeli War Against Iran
articles.expand: Oil prices continued to rise amid the escalating war between the US and Israel against Iran, as Tehran promised to fully close the Strait of Hormuz and launched an attack on the US embassy in Riyadh using drones. Brent crude rose above $80 per barrel after a roughly 7% jump on Monday, while West Texas Intermediate crude approached the $73 mark. Yes...
articles.ai_headline: Petróleo WTI sube 7% por escalada del conflicto entre EEUU, Israel y Irán: precios del crudo en alza → CAD alcista

articles.title: BOJ might have to put off March rate hike amid US-Iran conflict - report
articles.expand: The sources mentioned that the market volatility triggered by the US-Iran conflict has now raised the odds of the BOJ holding off on raising interest rates later this month. Adding that the only real factor that could see policymakers lean towards a rate hike would be to address the sharp decline in the Japanese yen currency. Of note, three of the ...
articles.ai_headline: Tensión EE.UU.-Irán puede retrasar alza de tasas de BOJ en marzo, soporte potencial para JPY

articles.title: FX Watch: EUR/AUD and AUD/CHF Could Eye Pullback Levels if Australia’s GDP Disappoints
articles.expand: Traders see Australia’s GDP surprising to the upside in Q4 2025. But if it misses, pairs like EUR/AUD and AUD/CHF could offer tactical pullback opportunities.
articles.ai_headline: GDP de Australia desfavorece expectativas: posible debilidad → AUD bajista

articles.title: FX Watch: AUD/USD and GBP/AUD Breakout Setups for an Upbeat Australian GDP
articles.expand: Can Australia’s GDP figure confirm the possibility of another RBA interest rate hike? Here’s what I’m watching on AUD/USD and GBP/AUD in this scenario.
articles.ai_headline: Posible alza de tasas del RBA tras esperado crecimiento del PIB australiano: AUD alcista

articles.title: Event Guide: Australia’s GDP Report (Q4 2025)
articles.expand: Expectations for a March RBA rate hike are running pretty high these days, so will the upcoming Australian GDP release cast doubts or seal the deal? Here’s what to look out for.
articles.ai_headline: Informe de PIB de Australia para Q4 2025 puede influir en decisión de tasas del RBA en marzo: presión sobre AUD

articles.title: AUD/JPY breaks high after hawkish RBA shift, 113.22 next
articles.expand: Australian Dollar rallied broadly after RBA Governor Michele Bullock delivered hawkish remarks that reintroduced a genuine possibility of a rate hike at the March meeting. By describing the decision as “live” and warning against assuming a hold, Bullock unsettled prior market consensus and injected fresh upside risk into rate expectations. The shif...
articles.ai_headline: Gobernadora del RBA Michele Bullock introduce posibilidad de alza de tasas en marzo: sesgo hawkish → AUD alcista

articles.title: RBA’s Bullock reopens door to March hike as oil risks mount
articles.expand: RBA Governor Michele Bullock delivered a distinctly hawkish message at the AFR Business Summit today, warning markets not to assume a March rate hold is a done deal. She stressed that the upcoming meeting is “live,” pushing back against expectations that policy decisions are effectively pre-set or limited to quarterly moves. Bullock highlighted tha...
articles.ai_headline: Gobernadora RBA Michele Bullock mantiene viva posibilidad de alza en marzo: presión alcista sobre AUD

articles.title: We are more prepared to intervene in FX market in view of international situation - SNB

articles.title: BOJ policymaker Himino: We'd still make necessary decision even if markets are volatile
articles.expand: Even when markets are volatile and there is a lot of uncertainty, we would still make necessary decision At times, we might need to shift policy precisely because markets are volatile It's not as if we would hold off on changing policy just because markets are volatile Appropriate to keep monetary conditions accommodative and gradually raising inte...

articles.expand: Real interest rates still significantly negative; policy remains accommodative following December's hike to 0.75% Natural rate of interest estimated between -1% and +0.5%, wide range makes precise policy calibration difficult Food price inflation primarily supply-side shock, not demand driven; expects deceleration below 2% in H1 2026 US economy res...
